app.name: Rewire
app.boot_error: Something needs a moment. Please reopen the app.

dashboard.awareness_caption: Higher means more of your moments happen consciously.
dashboard.insight_empty: Your behavioral map will start taking shape with the first interaction.

vulnerable.title: This is often a tricky moment.
vulnerable.body: No pressure — just checking in. How are you doing?

interceptor.capture_title: What set this off just now?
interceptor.capture_hint: One tap. Best guess is plenty.
interceptor.offer_title: Can you try this for a few minutes?
interceptor.resolution_hint: Every answer helps the map. There's no wrong one.

reflection.title: Evening Reflection
reflection.description: Logging these moments helps the behavioral engine understand your cues more deeply and anticipate them tomorrow.
reflection.question_general: How would you describe your sense of control today?
reflection.question_hard_moment: What made some moments harder today?

restart.title: Restart needed
restart.body: Switching the layout direction takes effect after a quick restart. Nothing will be lost.

insights.title: Your Habit Map
insights.description: Every line is an association your brain has learned. Thicker, closer lines are stronger loops — watch them loosen as you rewire.
insights.empty: Your map takes shape after the first few logged moments.
